label: Value of Travel Time Savings

source.publication: TAG Data Book v2.02, Tables A1.3.1-A1.3.3

methodology: Working time: based on gross earnings plus non-wage labour costs. Non-working time: stated preference studies (Arup/ITS Leeds).
caveats: Values are averages across all income groups. TAG provides distributional breakdowns in the Data Book.
Freight VTTS being updated based on 2023 Arup/ITS Leeds study, going definitive May 2026
